2026 WNPF SCHEDULE
**How to Pay Online for Your Event**
1. **Complete Your Application**: Click the online application link, fill out the form, and submit it. After submission, return to this page and scroll down to find the event wish to enter.
2. **Select Your Events**: Locate event(s) you want to enter. You can choose to enter one, two, three, or four events online. Click the "BUY-NOW" button for your selected events and follow the payment instructions. (Note: You do not need to be a PayPal member; you can pay with a credit or debit card.) Alternatively, you can pay via Cash App or Venmo by contacting Troy Ford at wnpf@aol.com or Ron DeAmicis at powerlt103@aol.com for additional details.
3. **Keep For Your Records**: If you need information about event, click on the event name to save for your records.
4. **Confirm Your Entry**: To receive confirmation of your event entry, please email the meet director. Thank you!
CLICK HERE FOR THE ONLINE APPLICATION
THIS MUST BE FILLED OUT AFTER PAYMENT IS MADE. THANK YOU
IF YOU SUBMIT AN APP AND DON'T PAY YOUR FEES YOUR ENTRY IS INVALID
MEET SHIRTS ARE INCLUDED WITH YOUR FEES
Meet dates can change, be added or deleted! Please check often
THIS IS FOR TEAM ENTRIES ONLY
If you're registering a team for any WNPF event, you can submit your team fee here.
All team members need to participate in the same event and pay their own entry fees!
Buy Now

************************************************************************************
Please click
MEET POSTER
for all of the information about the event you want to enter, you will find entry fees, times, locations and more. If you want to save your stamps and a trip to the post office fill out the online application and pay online with one of the links below! Thank you!
Click the BUY NOW button to pay for the meet you want to enter OR you can pay by Venmo or Cashapp. Please email us for the payment name for those particular apps.
